description: Brand voice validation rules for Carisma Aesthetics

forbidden_phrases.reason: Negative framing (focus on enhancement, not fixing)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Enhance your natural glow' or 'Reveal your best self'

forbidden_phrases.reason: Aggressive sales talk (contradicts graceful, confident tone)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Ready to feel radiant? Schedule your consultation when convenient'
Use: 'Results tailored to you' or 'Most patients see noticeable improvement'

forbidden_phrases.reason: Clinical jargon in promotional copy (avoid medical terminology)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Advanced laser technology' or 'Personalized treatment approach'

forbidden_phrases.reason: Overly clinical product names in patient-facing copy
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Personalized anti-aging treatment' or 'Tailored to your goals'

forbidden_phrases.reason: Generic or impersonal language (Aesthetics emphasizes personalization)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Your treatment is designed just for you' or 'Personalized consultation'

forbidden_phrases.reason: Overused marketing clichés (contradicts modern, honest tone)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Elegant results' or 'Personalized care' or 'Radiant confidence'

validation_rules.name: check_forbidden_phrases
validation_rules.description: Reject messages with aggressive sales or clinical jargon

validation_rules.name: check_personalization
validation_rules.description: Warn if message lacks personalization language
validation_rules.threshold: Should contain at least one personalization word (your, tailored, custom, etc.)

validation_rules.name: check_confidence_tone
validation_rules.description: Recommend confidence/radiance language for longer messages
validation_rules.threshold: Recommended for messages longer than 2 sentences

validation_rules.name: check_medical_credibility
validation_rules.description: Ensure clinical/consultation contexts include credibility markers
validation_rules.threshold: For messages discussing treatments or expertise, include at least one credibility marker

feedback_templates.missing_personalization:
Tone Tip
Try adding personalization language: tailored, custom, designed for you, your unique
Example: "Your treatment is personalized just for you."
feedback_templates.lacks_confidence_tone:
Tone Tip
Consider adding confidence/elegance words: radiant, graceful, elegant, confident
Example: "Feel radiant and confident in your own skin."
feedback_templates.missing_medical_credibility:
Professional Tip
When discussing treatments, include credibility: expert team, board-certified, FDA-cleared, advanced technology
Example: "Our expert team uses FDA-cleared technology tailored to your skin."

conciseness_rules.description: Enforce concise, human-like responses. Advisory only — agent may override with reason.

rules.name: list_formatting
rules.description: If listing 3 or more items, use bullet points or numbered list

feedback_templates.word_count_warning:
Conciseness Check
Your response is {word_count} words. Keep it under 150.

Tips:
• Lead with the answer
• Cut filler words
• One idea per sentence

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.sentence_count_warning:
Conciseness Check
Your response has {sentence_count} sentences. Aim for 4-6.

Quick fix:
• Combine related ideas
• Remove nice-to-haves
• One idea per sentence

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.list_formatting_warning:
Format Tip
You listed {item_count} items in paragraph form. Use bullets:
• Cleaner to read
• Easier to scan
• More readable on mobile

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.ai_voice_warning:
Tone Check
Found: "{phrase}"
This sounds like AI. Remove it and speak directly.

Instead:
• State the answer plainly
• Use 'you' language
• Sound like a real person

Override? (Y/N)

_notes.adaptation_for_other_brands: To adapt for other brands (Spa, Slimming), change 'brand' field and customize forbidden_phrases and required_tone_markers to match each brand's specific tone and risks.
_notes.personalization_emphasis: Carisma Aesthetics emphasizes personalization above all. Validation strongly encourages personalization language in all patient-facing messages.
_notes.clinical_terminology_boundary: Clinical terms (FDA-cleared, Alma laser, RF) are acceptable in consultation/educational contexts when paired with reassuring language. Avoid medical jargon in promotional copy.
_notes.confidence_not_arrogance: Confidence should feel assured, not arrogant. Pair with warmth and personalization to avoid sounding dismissive of patient concerns.
